TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Gmaalu = Nasi so uxe ta na ita ciida di na, ima ka gmalu ma mdrumuc qmita ita, nasi niqan kingan mnarux tsapah ta, so hari wa tamesil lnglungan ta, "ani naq so kiya," "mpbeyax ta naq ita "kiya kesun sbuwe ta unalu tnsapah ta.
S.PHON: = gmaalu = nasi so uxə ta na ita ʦiida di na, ima ka gmalu ma mdɾumuʦ qmita ita, nasi niqan kiŋan mnaɾux tsapaħ ta, so ħaɾi wa taməsil lŋluŋan ta, "ani naq so kija," "mpbəax ta naq ita "kija kəsun sbuwə ta unalu tnsapaħ ta.
S.FORM: = Gmaalu = Nasi so uxe ta na ita ciida di na, ima ka gmalu ma mdrumuc qmita ita, nasi niqan kingan mnarux tsapah ta, so hari wa tamesil lnglungan ta, "ani naq so kiya," "mpbeyax ta naq ita "kiya kesun sbuwe ta unalu tnsapah ta.
S.PHON: = gmaalu = nasi so uxə ta na ita ʦiida di na, ima ka gmalu ma mdɾumuʦ qmita ita, nasi niqan kiŋan mnaɾux tsapaħ ta, so ħaɾi wa taməsil lŋluŋan ta, "ani naq so kija," "mpbəax ta naq ita "kija kəsun sbuwə ta unalu tnsapaħ ta.
